title: Aangepast assortiment
desc: Bepaal welke producten zichtbaar mogen zijn voor uw vloot

treatments.brief: A product-visibility toggle list: product rows (Antifouling 2,5 L, RVS bout M12, ...) each with a category and a 'zichtbaar' on/off toggle (navy = on).
A catalogus -> curated-subset scope: full catalog count (1.240 producten) narrowing to a visible-to-fleet subset (320 zichtbaar), shown as a funnel/scope.
A ship × category visibility matrix: ships down the side, product categories across, with visible/hidden cells.
An included/excluded stat: a big '320 van 1.240 producten zichtbaar' with a progress ring + 'verborgen 920'.
A full-catalog -> gefilterd assortiment funnel: full assortment at top narrowing through a 'vloot-filter' to the curated set.
